iteration_1_baseline.notes: Chinese language skill, incorrect sed regex, find -exec {} broken by openclaw JSON parser

iteration_2.notes: Rewrote to English, added bash for-loop with tr/sed for kebab-case. Rename perfect. Search still stuck in find -exec {} loop

iteration_3.notes: Added 'do not create files' warning. Model still uses find -exec with corrupted {}. Search loops on same error 94 messages

iteration_4.notes: Eliminated find -exec, used pipes. Search got all correct values but write tool drops closing } from JSON. Rename timed out due to bash array syntax issues

iteration_5.notes: Simplified rename to individual mv commands. Search same issue: write tool drops closing }. Rename log had wrong mappings (model split multi-space filename)

changes_made: Rewrote skill from Chinese to English for better qwen3-30b comprehension
Added explicit bash for-loop pattern with tr/sed for kebab-case conversion
Added 'NEVER use find -exec' warning since openclaw JSON parser strips } from {}
Added 'do NOT create test data' warning since model tried to create dummy files
Added 'build rename log BEFORE renaming' instruction for correct original->new mapping
Replaced write tool JSON guidance with exec/printf/cat heredoc approach
Added pipe-based alternatives (xargs, while read) for all find operations
Added dot preservation rule for version numbers in filenames
key_findings: openclaw JSON parser corrupts {} to { in find -exec and drops trailing } from write tool content
qwen3-30b tends to create dummy files when asked to analyze a directory
qwen3-30b loops on failing commands without trying alternatives unless explicitly guided
Bash for-loop with tr/sed is the most reliable rename approach for this model
The write tool systematically drops the closing } brace from JSON content
final_skill_strategy: Combined best patterns from all iterations: bash for-loop for rename (iteration 2), pipe-based find alternatives (iteration 4), exec-based JSON writing to avoid write tool corruption, strong warnings against find-exec and creating test data
